property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: /Users/samuelswire/Library/Caches/Coursier/arc/https/github.com/sbt/sbt/releases/download/v1.9.7/sbt-1.9.7.zip/sbt/bin/sbt-launch.jar -info set Test / testOptions += Tests.Argument(TestFrameworks.ScalaTest, "-oC") test scalafmtCheckAll

testcase.name: test OB3 70105: QBI eligibility and floor

failure.message: TestFailedException was thrown during property evaluation. (QBIDeductionSpec.scala:35) Message: Some(100.00) did not contain 0.00 Location: (QBIDeductionSpec.scala:34) Occurred at table row 0 (zero based, not counting headings), which had values ( tentativeQualifiedBusinessIncomeDeduction = 100, qualifiedBusinessIncomeDeduction = 0 )

testcase.name: test QBI derivation

failure.message: TestFailedException was thrown during property evaluation.
